name: Pineapple-Peach Frappe'
recipeIngredient: 2 Water-packed peach halves, canned and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pineapple, pineapple juice, and peaches in a container of an electric blender or food processor; process until pureed.
2. Add the yogurt, skim milk, and sugar substitute; continue to process until smooth and thickened.
3. Pour into individual glasses and serve immediately.
Food Exchange Per-Serving: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE + 1 MILK EXCHANGE; CAL: 133; CHO: 6 MG; CAR: 23 GM; PRO: 7 GM; FAT: 1 GM; SOD: 103 MG
